QueryExtension.SQL: SELECT F.FEES_PAID_ID AS "F.FEES_PAID_ID", F.PROCESS_NUMBER AS "F.PROCESS_NUMBER", F.PROCESS_TYPE AS "F.PROCESS_TYPE", F.ALLOCATION_DATE AS "F.ALLOCATION_DATE", F.AMOUNT AS "F.AMOUNT", F.AMOUNT_CURRENCY AS "F.AMOUNT_CURRENCY", F.ISSUING_COURT AS "F.ISSUING_COURT", F.USER_ID AS "F.USER_ID", F.DATE_CREATED AS "F.DATE_CREATED", F.DELETED_FLAG AS "F.DELETED_FLAG", (SELECT CASE WHEN F.AMOUNT < 0 THEN 'REFUND' ELSE 'FEE' END FROM FEES_PAID F1 WHERE F1.FEES_PAID_ID = F.FEES_PAID_ID ) AS "F1.TYPE", 'EXISTING' AS "EXISTING_VALUE", F.ORA_ROWSCN AS "F_ORA_ROWSCN" FROM FEES_PAID F WHERE F.PROCESS_NUMBER = ${param.ProcessNumber} AND F.PROCESS_TYPE = ${param.ProcessType} AND F.ISSUING_COURT = ${param.IssuingCourtCode} AND F.DELETED_FLAG = 'N'
